overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi survival game. The player character explores a futuristic research facility, transitioning between a hydroponics laboratory, industrial maintenance stairwells, and a secondary specimen storage room while interacting with technology and collecting items.

scene_state.functional_zone: hydroponics research laboratory with plant cultivation stations

events.description: character interacts with wrist-mounted TERRA device displaying system interface
character stands up from working at the hydroponics workbench
character approaches the APIARY observation window revealing the lab interior

agents.ego_description: character examines wrist device, stands from workbench, and walks through the hydroponics lab surveying plant specimens

entered.detail: metal workbench with scattered plant samples and tools
green leafy plants in various containers and trays
tall shelving units with rows of cultivated plants under grow lights
large glass partition with APIARY logo and Chinese characters
white plastic bins and boxes stacked near the work area

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a close-up of the character interacting with a wrist-mounted device at a hydroponics workbench. The character then stands and explores a laboratory filled with plant specimens and vertical growing racks. The APIARY glass wall becomes visible as the character moves through the teal-lit space.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial maintenance stairwell with metal catwalks

events.description: character exits hydroponics lab through pressure door into industrial shaft
character begins ascending the metal staircase
lighting shifts from teal laboratory to yellow industrial emergency lighting

agents.ego_description: character climbs multiple flights of metal stairs and walks along elevated industrial catwalks surrounded by pipes

entered.detail: multi-level metal staircase with grated steps and railings
large insulated pipes running along walls and ceiling
heavy metal airlock-style doors with warning labels
metal safety railings along elevated walkways
amber emergency lights illuminating the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the clean laboratory into a narrow industrial maintenance shaft. The environment shifts to yellow emergency lighting as the character ascends multiple levels of metal staircases and walks along elevated catwalks surrounded by industrial piping.

scene_state.functional_zone: secondary laboratory Office B1 with specimen storage

events.description: character enters Office B1 through pressure door into another laboratory space
character opens black equipment case revealing medical vials inside
character picks up a cylindrical vial from the equipment case

agents.ego_description: character explores the secondary lab, approaches an equipment case, and collects a medical vial specimen

entered.detail: pressure door labeled OFFICE B1 with warning signage
white counter space with scientific equipment and containers
open black case containing rows of medical vials
screen displaying data and system information

segments.scene_description: The character enters Office B1, a secondary laboratory with green-tinted lighting and specimen storage. The character approaches a workbench, opens an equipment case containing medical vials, and collects one. The room features laboratory counters, glass specimen racks, and a wall monitor.

events.description: character exits Office B1 back into the yellow-lit industrial corridor
character walks through the corridor toward the exit pressure door

agents.ego_description: character leaves the laboratory and walks back through the industrial corridor toward the exit

entered.detail: industrial hallway with amber emergency lighting
metal pressure door at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character exits Office B1 and returns to the yellow-lit industrial corridor. The segment shows the character walking through the narrow passage toward a pressure door at the end of the hallway, concluding the exploration sequence.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sterile hydroponics laboratory through industrial maintenance shafts and into a secondary specimen storage room. It begins with a close-up of the character interacting with a wrist-mounted device at a workbench before moving through a teal-lit space filled with vertical growing racks and glass walls. As the character leaves the laboratory, the environment shifts abruptly to a narrow industrial shaft where yellow emergency lighting illuminates metal staircases and elevated catwalks surrounded by piping. The scene then opens into Office B1, a green-tinted secondary lab where the camera follows the character to a workbench to collect a medical vial from an equipment case. Finally, the camera tracks the character as they exit the room and return to the yellow-lit industrial corridor, walking through the narrow passage toward a pressure door at the end of the hallway.
